title: Test sequence looping and STOP command
description: Test the LOOP flag on all sequences (PLAY n LOOP / SPLAY n LOOP). Verify loops restart cleanly without glitches, STOP command reliably halts looping sequences, and continuous servos ramp down to stop when sequence ends.

title: Add safety limits and error handling
description: Consider adding: per-servo min/max degree clamps to prevent mechanical binding, timeout watchdog to auto-stop if no serial input for N minutes, input buffer overflow handling (currently silently ignored at 50 chars), and validation of degree/pulse values before applying to prevent out-of-range PWM signals.

title: Create full choreographed demo sequence
description: Design a complete demo sequence that exercises all connected servos (channels 0-4) including the continuous servo on channel 3. This serves as both a showcase and an integration test for the whole system. Should demonstrate raises, tilts, wave patterns, and continuous rotation in a coordinated routine.

title: Integrate continuous servo into keyframe sequences
description: Currently the continuous servo (channel 3, goBILDA 25-3) has its own separate speed sequence (SPLAY). Add a unified sequence mode that combines positional keyframes and speed frames so you can run everything from a single PLAY command. This may require a new sequence type that interleaves Keyframe and SpeedFrame arrays, or a master sequence that triggers sub-sequences.

title: Verify all keyframe sequences work correctly
description: Test each of the 5 keyframe sequences (PLAY 1-5) and the speed sequence (SPLAY 1) with the physical hardware. Confirm servos move as described in sequence_setup.h comments. Document any issues with timing, range, or easing.

title: Remove unused capabilities and dead code
description: Clean up the codebase: remove commented-out SM-S4303R calibrations in servo_setup.h, evaluate whether wave pattern feature is actively used, check if sweepServo() blocking calibration function is still needed, review if all 16 servo channels need default config or if unused channels should be explicitly disabled.

title: Test servo 4 (Hitec HS-805BB+) with sequences
description: Servo 4 is configured but none of the existing sequences use it. Create or adapt a sequence that includes servo 4 to verify its calibration and range. Confirm it works alongside the goBILDA servos.

title: Add time multiplier for long-duration sequences (30min-1hr)
description: Sequences need to support long durations (30 minutes to 1 hour) for final use, but must remain testable at short durations during development. Approach: add a time multiplier system so sequences are authored with short test timings and scaled up for production. Consider a global multiplier settable via serial command (e.g. TIMESCALE 10x) or per-sequence multiplier in sequence_setup.h.
